gates.message: External review intake is bound to the current handoff package.
Review records must be valid JSON.
Review records must declare the current external human review schema version before they can affect readiness.
Valid review records must match the active Fund candidate identity.
Valid review records require public-safe review source refs.
External review URL records require a locally fetched source receipt with URL, hash, candidate binding, and current schema binding.
External review records must not contain prohibited overclaim text.
Invalid or unverified reviews are recorded but cannot increase readiness scores.
A supportive review can affect scoring only with independent reproduction and bounded novelty assessment.
A supportive review can affect scoring only when its source ref is an external public URL, not a local self-report.
Independent external reproduction can clear bounded-100 blockers only when its review source is an external public URL.

nextHumanAction: Place candidate-matching external human review JSON records in .sovryn/nobel-readiness/external-review-reviews, then rerun this intake.
